title: verbascum × ignescens
intro: Verbascum × ignescens is a hybrid plant species known as a flowering perennial, resulting from the cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum phoeniceum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Verbascum × ignescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being utilized in topical creams and salves to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
